name: Remote File Execution via MSIEXEC
description: Suspicious use of msiexec.exe to install remote MSI files detected, indicating potential malicious payload execution via a signed binary proxy.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when msiexec.exe was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the msiexec.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of msiexec.exe, including the remote URL and silent flags.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed msiexec.exe.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The parent process that launched msiexec.exe.

parameters.name: IntegrityLevel
parameters.description: The integrity level of the msiexec.exe process.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
